requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——PNS / BPS标准（基于CISPR）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——PNS / BPS標準（基於CISPR）

summary.en: The Bureau of Philippine Standards (BPS) under the Department of Trade and Industry (DTI) publishes Philippine National Standards (PNS) that adopt IEC and CISPR international standards. Wireless and IoT devices must comply with applicable PNS EMC standards covering conducted and radiated emissions and, where relevant, immunity. BPS-accredited laboratories or DOST-ITDI are the recognised testing bodies. EMC test reports from FCC or CE-accredited laboratories may be submitted to NTC as supporting documentation during the type acceptance process, but Philippine-specific PNS conformity assessment from a recognised laboratory is the baseline expectation. The PNS framework is distinct from Chinese GB standards; Chinese EMC test reports do not satisfy Philippine PNS requirements without separate evaluation.
summary.zh: 菲律宾贸工部（DTI）下属菲律宾标准局（BPS）发布菲律宾国家标准（PNS），采用IEC和CISPR国际标准。无线及物联网设备须符合涵盖传导和辐射发射及（相关情况下）抗扰度的适用PNS电磁兼容标准。BPS认可实验室或DOST-ITDI为认可检测机构。来自FCC或CE认可实验室的电磁兼容测试报告可在型号认可过程中作为支持性文件提交NTC，但经认可实验室出具的菲律宾特定PNS符合性评定为基本预期。PNS框架有别于中国GB标准；中国电磁兼容测试报告未经单独评定不满足菲律宾PNS要求。
summary.zht: 菲律賓貿工部（DTI）下屬菲律賓標準局（BPS）發布菲律賓國家標準（PNS），採用IEC和CISPR國際標準。無線及物聯網裝置須符合涵蓋傳導和輻射發射及（相關情況下）抗擾度的適用PNS電磁相容標準。BPS認可實驗室或DOST-ITDI為認可測試機構。來自FCC或CE認可實驗室的電磁相容測試報告可在型號認可過程中作為支持性文件提交NTC，但經認可實驗室出具的菲律賓特定PNS符合性評定為基本預期。PNS框架有別於中國GB標準；中國電磁相容測試報告未經單獨評定不符合菲律賓PNS要求。

standards_or_laws: PNS / BPS — Philippine National Standards adopting IEC and CISPR international standards for EMC
CISPR 32 / IEC 55032 — Multimedia equipment EMC (emissions) adopted as PNS reference
CISPR 35 / IEC 55035 — Multimedia equipment EMC (immunity) adopted as PNS reference
Republic Act No. 7394 — Consumer Act of the Philippines (product safety and standards framework under DTI)
BPS Accreditation Program for testing laboratories (DOST-ITDI and BPS-accredited labs recognised)

summary.en: Chinese manufacturers comply with GB/T 9254 (Information Technology Equipment EMC, aligned with CISPR 22 / CISPR 32) for emissions and GB 17625.1 (aligned with IEC 61000-3-2) for harmonic current, tested at CNAS-accredited laboratories. CCC EMC testing for applicable product categories covers GB/T 9254 compliance. These Chinese GB-standard test reports are not directly recognised under the Philippine PNS / BPS framework and do not substitute for PNS-standard assessment by a BPS-accredited or DOST-ITDI laboratory.
summary.zh: 中国制造商遵循GB/T 9254（信息技术设备电磁兼容，与CISPR 22 / CISPR 32对标）进行发射测试，以及GB 17625.1（与IEC 61000-3-2对标）进行谐波电流测试，均在CNAS认可实验室进行。适用产品类别的CCC电磁兼容测试涵盖GB/T 9254合规。上述中国GB标准测试报告不被菲律宾PNS / BPS框架直接承认，不能替代BPS认可或DOST-ITDI实验室出具的PNS标准评定。
summary.zht: 中國製造商遵循GB/T 9254（資訊技術設備電磁相容，與CISPR 22 / CISPR 32對標）進行發射測試，以及GB 17625.1（與IEC 61000-3-2對標）進行諧波電流測試，均在CNAS認可實驗室進行。適用產品類別的CCC電磁相容測試涵蓋GB/T 9254合規。上述中國GB標準測試報告不被菲律賓PNS / BPS框架直接承認，不能替代BPS認可或DOST-ITDI實驗室出具的PNS標準評定。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254 — Information technology equipment EMC (emissions, aligned with CISPR 22/32) — CNAS-accredited lab testing
GB 17625.1 — Harmonic current emissions limit (aligned with IEC 61000-3-2)
CCC EMC scope — GB/T 9254 and related GB standards for applicable product categories under CNCA
SRRC radio type approval — includes RF emissions characterisation under MIIT requirements

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 9254 and GB 17625 EMC test reports are not directly recognised under Philippine PNS / BPS requirements. Separate PNS-standard EMC testing at a BPS-accredited or DOST-ITDI laboratory is the baseline expectation for Philippine market access. FCC or ETSI / CE-accredited laboratory reports may be submitted to NTC during TA review as supporting equivalency evidence, which can reduce testing burden, but final determination rests with NTC. Chinese CCC EMC documentation provides no direct pathway to Philippine PNS conformity.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 9254和GB 17625电磁兼容测试报告不被菲律宾PNS / BPS要求直接承认。在BPS认可或DOST-ITDI实验室进行的符合PNS标准的电磁兼容测试是进入菲律宾市场的基本预期。来自FCC或ETSI / CE认可实验室的报告可在型号认可审查中作为等效证据支持性文件提交NTC，可减少测试负担，但最终裁量权归NTC。中国CCC电磁兼容文件不为菲律宾PNS合规提供直接路径。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 9254和GB 17625電磁相容測試報告不被菲律賓PNS / BPS要求直接承認。在BPS認可或DOST-ITDI實驗室進行的符合PNS標準的電磁相容測試是進入菲律賓市場的基本預期。來自FCC或ETSI / CE認可實驗室的報告可在型號認可審查中作為等效證據支持性文件提交NTC，可減少測試負擔，但最終裁量權歸NTC。中國CCC電磁相容文件不為菲律賓PNS合規提供直接路徑。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — PNS / BPS EMC conformity required under DTI / RA 7394 and as part of NTC type acceptance; BPS-accredited or DOST-ITDI laboratory testing expected
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 9254 EMC compliance required; CCC EMC testing for applicable product categories under CNCA; CNAS-accredited laboratory testing required

source.publisher: Bureau of Philippine Standards (BPS) — Department of Trade and Industry (DTI), Republic of the Philippines

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Philippine PNS / BPS EMC standards (adopting CISPR / IEC) apply to wireless and IoT devices as part of the NTC type acceptance and DTI product safety framework. Chinese GB/T 9254 EMC test reports are not directly substitutable for PNS-standard assessment. FCC or CE-accredited lab reports may be used as supporting evidence during NTC TA review. Testing at a BPS-accredited laboratory or DOST-ITDI is the baseline expectation for Philippine market entry.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 菲律宾PNS / BPS电磁兼容标准（采用CISPR / IEC）适用于无线及物联网设备，作为NTC型号认可和DTI产品安全框架的组成部分。中国GB/T 9254电磁兼容测试报告不能直接替代PNS标准评定。FCC或CE认可实验室报告可在NTC型号认可审查中作为支持性证据。在BPS认可实验室或DOST-ITDI进行测试是进入菲律宾市场的基本预期。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 菲律賓PNS / BPS電磁相容標準（採用CISPR / IEC）適用於無線及物聯網裝置，作為NTC型號認可和DTI產品安全框架的組成部分。中國GB/T 9254電磁相容測試報告不能直接替代PNS標準評定。FCC或CE認可實驗室報告可在NTC型號認可審查中作為支持性證據。在BPS認可實驗室或DOST-ITDI進行測試是進入菲律賓市場的基本預期。

requirement_topic.en: Radio Performance — NTC Spectrum and Technical Requirements (2.4 GHz / 5 GHz)
requirement_topic.zh: 无线电性能——NTC频谱及技术要求（2.4 GHz / 5 GHz）
requirement_topic.zht: 無線電性能——NTC頻譜及技術要求（2.4 GHz / 5 GHz）

summary.en: NTC manages radio spectrum in the Philippines under Republic Act 3846 and Republic Act 7925. The 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz ISM / unlicensed bands are available for Wi-Fi and Bluetooth devices in the Philippines. NTC type acceptance (TA) includes verification of radio performance parameters: transmit power limits, out-of-band emissions, channel plans, and modulation conformance against NTC technical standards and applicable ITU-R recommendations adopted by NTC. Devices must not exceed NTC-specified transmit power limits. NTC technical standards for specific frequency bands are issued via NTC Memoranda and are independent of SRRC (China), FCC (US), or ETSI (EU) technical limits. FCC or ETSI test reports from accredited laboratories may be submitted as supporting documentation during NTC TA review and may assist in the equivalency determination, but NTC retains authority over final technical acceptance.
summary.zh: NTC依据《共和国法案3846》和《共和国法案7925》管理菲律宾无线电频谱。2.4 GHz和5 GHz ISM / 免许可频段在菲律宾可用于Wi-Fi和蓝牙设备。NTC型号认可（TA）包括对无线电性能参数的核验：依据NTC技术标准及NTC采用的适用ITU-R建议书，核查发射功率限值、带外发射、信道计划和调制合规性。设备不得超过NTC规定的发射功率限值。NTC针对特定频段发布的技术标准通过NTC备忘录颁布，独立于SRRC（中国）、FCC（美国）或ETSI（欧盟）技术限值。来自认可实验室的FCC或ETSI测试报告可在NTC型号认可审查中作为支持性文件提交，可协助等效性裁量，但NTC保有最终技术认可的权力。
summary.zht: NTC依據《共和國法案3846》和《共和國法案7925》管理菲律賓無線電頻譜。2.4 GHz和5 GHz ISM / 免許可頻段在菲律賓可用於Wi-Fi和藍牙設備。NTC型號認可（TA）包括對無線電性能參數的核驗：依據NTC技術標準及NTC採用的適用ITU-R建議書，核查發射功率限值、帶外發射、頻道計畫和調製合規性。設備不得超過NTC規定的發射功率限值。NTC針對特定頻段發布的技術標準通過NTC備忘錄頒布，獨立於SRRC（中國）、FCC（美國）或ETSI（歐盟）技術限值。來自認可實驗室的FCC或ETSI測試報告可在NTC型號認可審查中作為支持性文件提交，可協助等效性裁量，但NTC保有最終技術認可的權力。

standards_or_laws: Republic Act No. 3846 — Radio Control Law of the Philippines (as amended; NTC spectrum authority)
Republic Act No. 7925 — Public Telecommunications Policy Act (NTC type acceptance framework)
NTC Memoranda on technical standards for specific frequency bands (2.4 GHz, 5 GHz ISM unlicensed bands)
ITU-R Recommendations adopted by NTC for radio performance conformance
NTC type acceptance technical requirements for Wi-Fi (IEEE 802.11 series) and Bluetooth devices

summary.en: Chinese wireless device radio performance is governed by SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) type approval under MIIT. SRRC covers 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz ISM band devices with China-specific transmit power limits and channel plans per MIIT frequency allocation. Chinese manufacturers hold SRRC test reports from CNAS-accredited or SRRC-designated laboratories. SRRC approval is a separate national certification and is not recognised by NTC Philippines. Chinese SRRC power limits and channel plans may differ from NTC technical requirements.
summary.zh: 中国无线设备无线电性能受MIIT下属无线电型号核准（SRRC）管辖。SRRC涵盖2.4 GHz和5 GHz ISM频段设备，遵循MIIT频率划分的中国特定发射功率限值和信道计划。中国制造商持有CNAS认可或SRRC指定实验室出具的SRRC测试报告。SRRC批准为独立的国家认证，不被菲律宾NTC承认。中国SRRC功率限值和信道计划可能与NTC技术要求存在差异。
summary.zht: 中國無線設備無線電性能受MIIT下屬無線電型號核准（SRRC）管轄。SRRC涵蓋2.4 GHz和5 GHz ISM頻段設備，遵循MIIT頻率劃分的中國特定發射功率限值和頻道計畫。中國製造商持有CNAS認可或SRRC指定實驗室出具的SRRC測試報告。SRRC批准為獨立的國家認證，不被菲律賓NTC承認。中國SRRC功率限值和頻道計畫可能與NTC技術要求存在差異。

standards_or_laws: SRRC radio type approval — MIIT (State Radio Regulation of China), covering 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz ISM band devices
MIIT frequency allocation for 2.4 GHz (2400–2483.5 MHz) and 5 GHz ISM / RLAN bands
China transmit power limits for 2.4 GHz WLAN: 100 mW (20 dBm) EIRP
SRRC certification test reports from CNAS-accredited or SRRC-designated laboratories

gap.en: SRRC approval and Chinese transmit power / channel specifications are not recognised by Philippine NTC. NTC technical requirements for 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz devices are set by NTC Memoranda and must be verified as part of TA. FCC or ETSI test reports from accredited laboratories (covering power, out-of-band, and channel conformance) may be submitted during NTC TA review as supporting documentation for equivalency consideration, potentially reducing retesting burden. Exporters must confirm that device power adapter specifications accommodate the Philippine 220 V / 60 Hz supply (unique: 220 V at 60 Hz, unlike most 220 V markets at 50 Hz) and that A / B type plugs are compatible.
gap.zh: SRRC批准及中国发射功率 / 信道规格不被菲律宾NTC承认。NTC针对2.4 GHz和5 GHz设备的技术要求通过NTC备忘录设定，须在型号认可过程中进行核验。来自认可实验室的FCC或ETSI测试报告（涵盖功率、带外发射和信道合规性）可在NTC型号认可审查中作为支持性文件提交，供等效性考量，有望减少重新测试负担。出口商须确认设备电源适配器规格兼容菲律宾220V / 60Hz供电（独特组合：220V但60Hz，不同于大多数220V市场的50Hz），且A / B型插头适配。
gap.zht: SRRC批准及中國發射功率 / 頻道規格不被菲律賓NTC承認。NTC針對2.4 GHz和5 GHz設備的技術要求通過NTC備忘錄設定，須在型號認可過程中進行核驗。來自認可實驗室的FCC或ETSI測試報告（涵蓋功率、帶外發射和頻道合規性）可在NTC型號認可審查中作為支持性文件提交，供等效性考量，有望減少重新測試負擔。出口商須確認設備電源適配器規格兼容菲律賓220 V / 60 Hz供電（獨特組合：220 V但60 Hz，不同於大多數220 V市場的50 Hz），且A / B型插頭適配。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — radio performance conformance with NTC technical requirements is required as part of NTC type acceptance under Republic Act 7925 and Republic Act 3846; NTC Memoranda set specific power and channel limits for 2.4 GHz / 5 GHz devices
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — SRRC radio type approval (MIIT) specifies 2.4 GHz / 5 GHz transmit power limits and channel plans; SRRC certification from CNAS or SRRC-designated laboratory required

source.publisher: National Telecommunications Commission (NTC) — Republic of the Philippines

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] NTC type acceptance includes verification of radio performance (transmit power, out-of-band emissions, channel conformance) against NTC technical standards for 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz devices. SRRC approval and Chinese power / channel specifications are not recognised. FCC or ETSI-accredited lab test reports may support NTC TA equivalency review. Additionally, device power adapter specifications must accommodate the Philippines' unique 220 V / 60 Hz (Type A / B plug) power environment — verify wide-input adapter rating before export.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] NTC型号认可包括依据NTC技术标准对2.4 GHz和5 GHz设备的无线电性能（发射功率、带外发射、信道合规性）进行核验。SRRC批准和中国功率 / 信道规格不被承认。来自FCC或ETSI认可实验室的测试报告可支持NTC型号认可等效性审查。此外，设备电源适配器规格须兼容菲律宾独特的220V / 60Hz（A / B型插头）电源环境——出口前请核验宽电压适配器额定值。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] NTC型號認可包括依據NTC技術標準對2.4 GHz和5 GHz設備的無線電性能（發射功率、帶外發射、頻道合規性）進行核驗。SRRC批准和中國功率 / 頻道規格不被承認。來自FCC或ETSI認可實驗室的測試報告可支持NTC型號認可等效性審查。此外，設備電源適配器規格須兼容菲律賓獨特的220 V / 60 Hz（A / B型插頭）電源環境——出口前請核驗寬電壓適配器額定值。
